info.title: Proector API
info.description: Backend API documentation for Proector mobile and admin platforms.

post.description: Authenticates admin with username/password and returns scoped access token.
Revokes current admin access token.
Changes authenticated admin password after validating current password.

get.description: Returns paginated bookings list for admin operations with optional status filter.
Returns full booking details for admin review and management.

put.description: Updates editable booking attributes such as start time, duration, team, and notes.

post.description: Assigns an available team to pending booking and transitions status to confirmed.

security_team_id.description: ID of available security team to assign

post.description: Completes booking from admin side and releases assigned team availability.

get.description: Returns client list for admin with verification and activity details.
Returns full client profile including verification docs and booking/payment history.

post.description: Approves or rejects client verification request with optional rejection reason.

get.description: Returns admin dashboard KPIs for bookings, teams, clients, and revenue.
Returns current active bookings with latest security team locations for monitoring map.
Returns paginated payment records with client and booking references.
Returns admin analytics summary for bookings, revenue, ratings, and top performing teams.
Returns all security teams with personnel and currently active bookings.

post.description: Creates a new security team with service type and team size.

get.description: Returns all vehicles with availability and usage metadata.

post.description: Creates a vehicle record that can be assigned to bookings.
Sends OTP code for new client registration using phone number.
Sends OTP code for existing client login.

phone.description: Existing client phone in international format

post.description: Completes client registration by verifying OTP and requiring first and last name.
Completes client login by verifying OTP for an existing account.
Revokes current access token for authenticated client session.
Sets or changes authenticated client password. current_password is required only when password already exists.

current_password.description: Required when client already has a password

get.description: Returns security service catalog including pricing components.

services.description: List of service definitions with pricing metadata

get.description: Returns currently available vehicles that can be selected during booking.
Returns UI constraints and option lists for booking flow steps.

post.description: Calculates estimated booking amount from service, guard count, and time window (start_time to end_time).

start_time.description: Window start (defaults to now if omitted)

end_time.description: Service end time (must be 1–24 hours after start)

get.description: Returns paginated bookings for authenticated client with optional status filter.

post.description: Creates a new booking request after verification checks and quote calculation. Scheduling is inferred from start_time: omit it for immediate (starts now), send it for scheduled (≥30 minutes ahead).

persons_to_protect_count.description: How many people are being protected.

vehicle_id.description: Optional preferred vehicle ID. Default is null (auto assignment).

start_time.description: Omit or null = immediate (start is server now). Set = scheduled (must be ≥30 minutes in the future, within 90 days).

end_time.description: Service end time (must be 1–24 hours after booking start).

guard_outfit.description: Preferred guard outfit. Default is null.

persons.description: Optional persons details. If omitted/empty, server auto-adds authenticated client as first protected person.

get.description: Returns active client bookings in pending/confirmed/ongoing/arrived states.
Returns completed and cancelled bookings with payment and rating details.
Returns full booking details with team, chat, payment, and rating data.

post.description: Cancels booking according to state machine rules and applies refund policy.

get.description: Returns paginated chat messages for a client booking conversation.

post.description: Sends a message from client to assigned security personnel for a booking.

message.description: Text body to send in chat

post.description: Marks a booking chat message as read for the authenticated client.
Sends an SOS alert from client to assigned security team and broadcasts realtime alert.

get.description: Returns paginated payment history for the authenticated client.

post.description: Charges selected payment method and marks booking payment status as paid on success.

get.description: Returns active client payment methods with default method first.

post.description: Adds a new card or mobile pay method for the authenticated client.

is_default.description: Marks method as default when true

post.description: Marks the selected payment method as default and unsets previous default.

delete.description: Soft-removes a payment method from client account by disabling it.

get.description: Returns authenticated client profile with a stable JSON shape (all client fields always present; verification_status defaults to pending when unset), plus active bookings and booking history.
Returns authenticated client profile, payment methods, and verification documents.

put.description: Updates account details such as name, email, date of birth, and sex.

post.description: Uploads client avatar image. Replaces previous avatar when it exists.
Marks currently authenticated client as verified.

put.description: Updates notification settings for text, voice, and push channels.

get.description: Returns current KYC status with rejection reason and document upload flag.
Returns latest security team location and booking status for client tracking screen.

post.description: Processes payment provider webhook events with idempotency protection.
Authenticates security personnel with username/password and returns token.
Revokes current security personnel access token.
Changes authenticated security personnel password after validating current password.

get.description: Returns chat thread for a security-assigned booking.

post.description: Sends chat message from security personnel to client and broadcasts realtime event.

message_type.description: Message category used by chat UI

get.summary: Get active orders for security personnel
get.description: Returns active bookings assigned to authenticated security personnel team.
Returns completed and cancelled orders assigned to security team.
Returns details of a specific assigned order including chat and latest location.

post.description: Transitions booking to ongoing state and starts live location tracking.
Transitions booking to arrived state and records latest team location.
Transitions arrived booking to completed and frees team/personnel availability.
Pushes periodic location updates for active booking tracking.

sanctum.description: Use Bearer {token} from login or OTP verification endpoints.
